title: Abelardo De La Espriella, Right-Wing Outsider, Could Be Colombia’s Next President
summary_full: President Trump endorsed Abelardo De La Espriella, the conservative presidential candidate in Sunday’s election who has strong U.S. ties.
summary_public: President Trump endorsed Abelardo De La Espriella, the conservative presidential candidate in Sunday’s election who has strong U.S. ties.
